ranking: In 2024, RCC Institute of Information Technology (RCCIIT) was ranked 1427 in India and 4437 in Asia by the Scientific Index. Within West Bengal, it secured the 23rd position in the NIRF 2024 rankings. For Engineering, RCCIIT ranks 96 out of 200 in India according to Outlook Rankings 2025. The institute is also considered one of the best engineering institutes under the West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination (WBJEE) and ranks among the top 10 private and government engineering colleges in the state.
resultInfo:
RCC Institute of Information Technology is affiliated with Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (MAKAUT), West Bengal. The institute follows the semester examination system as prescribed by MAKAUT. Semester exams are typically considered to have an 8/10 difficulty level, which can vary based on student preparation. 

MAKAUT guidelines also incorporate an Academic Bank of Credits (ABC) system, allowing students to earn additional credit points (up to 20) through participation in online courses from platforms like SWAYAM-NPTEL, Coursera, edX, IIRS-ISRO, and NASSCOM Future Skill Prime. These certificates also contribute to Mandatory Additional Points (MAR), where students can earn a maximum of 40 points over four years. 

For the 2024-2025 academic year, first-semester exams were scheduled from January 6 to January 15, 2025, with results expected around February 20, 2025. Students are required to fill out forms for regular and backlog odd semester examinations, as indicated by recent notices for the 2025-2026 session.
